ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_level" INTEGER /* Level of the race (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "race_season" INTEGER /* Season the race belongs to */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race was held */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track where the race was held */,
  "race_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the race in minutes */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in miles */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  "race_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race (e.g., sunny, rainy, overcast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer the driver is affiliated with */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the driver (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "driver_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_height" INTEGER /* Height of the driver in inches */,
  "driver_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the driver in pounds */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver started their professional career */,
  "driver_sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver statistic */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver the statistic belongs to */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the statistic was recorded in */,
  "finishing_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the driver in the race */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the driver in the race */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Number of laps led by the driver in the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver during the race */,
  "fastest_lap" REAL /* Time of the driver's fastest lap */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Position in qualifying */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver in the race (e.g., finished, DNF, DNS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_stats_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_stats_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer the team is affiliated with */,
  "team_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_owners" TEXT /* Names of the team owners */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the team */,
  "team_home_base" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "team_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the statistic was recorded in */,
  "finishing_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the team in the race */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team in the race */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Number of laps led by the team in the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the team's cars during the race */,
  "fastest_lap" REAL /* Time of the team's fastest lap */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of pit stops made by the team */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Average qualifying position of the team's drivers */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the team in the race (e.g., finished, DNF, DNS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap time */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver the lap time belongs to */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the lap time was recorded in */,
  "lap_num" INTEGER /* Number of the lap */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "lap_speed" REAL /* Speed of the driver during the lap */,
  "lap_running_position" INTEGER /* Running position of the driver during the lap */,
  "fuel_level" INTEGER /* Fuel level at the start of the lap */,
  "tire_type" TEXT /* Type of tires used during the lap */,
  "pit_stop_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator if a pit stop was made during the lap */,
  "lap_status" TEXT /* Status of the lap (e.g., completed, accident, mechanical issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturer_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer statistic */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer the statistic belongs to */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the statistic was recorded in */,
  "finishing_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the manufacturer in the race */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the manufacturer in the race */,
  "cars_entered" INTEGER /* Number of cars entered by the manufacturer in the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the manufacturer's cars during the race */,
  "fastest_lap" REAL /* Time of the manufacturer's fastest lap */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of pit stops made by the manufacturer's cars */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Average qualifying position of the manufacturer's cars */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the manufacturer in the race (e.g., finished, DNF, DNS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturer_stats_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, team owner, NASCAR official) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
